# Damian Moser

> Portfolio of Damian Moser — open-source enthusiast, tinkerer, and developer.
> Master's student in Robotics, Systems & Control at ETH Zurich.
> Development Engineer at Super Computing Systems (Zurich).
> Based in St. Gallen, Switzerland.

This site is an interactive POSIX terminal. Content is also available as static HTML
under /commands/ for crawlers and agents that do not execute JavaScript.

## Pages

- [About (whoami)](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/whoami.html): Overview, bio, location, current role
- [Experience](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/experience.html): Professional work (SCS, apprenticeship)
- [Education](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/education.html): ETH Zurich MSc Robotics, exchange, path to university
- [Skills](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/skills.html): Programming languages and tools
- [Projects](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/projects.html): Index of personal and open-source projects
- [Homeserver (Neo)](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/homeserver.html): Self-hosted infrastructure and Neo framework
- [Rubik's Cube Solver](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/rubiks.html): Browser cube solver (live at rubiks.damo4mf20.ch)
- [Ultimate Tic Tac Toe](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/uttt.html): Genetic / PSO self-training bots
- [Mandelbrot Explained](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/mandelbrot.html): Educational Mandelbrot visualization
- [Contact](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/contact.html): Email and links
- [Message](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/message.html): Send a message via the terminal
- [Help](https://damianmoser.ch/commands/help.html): Available terminal commands

## Links

- Home: https://damianmoser.ch/
- GitHub: https://github.com/madebydamo
- Sitemap: https://damianmoser.ch/sitemap.xml
